message:
test(engine): add comprehensive unit tests to claim, seqlock, and contract modules

claim_entitlement: +727 lines of in-module tests; make lattice_has_cycle public.
claim_envelope_contract: +470 lines — contract validation, scenario evaluation,
serde round-trips, staleness boundary, downgrade paths.
hindsight_boundary_capture: +227 lines — schema constants, enum serde, error
display, empty field rejection, correlation keys, redaction map, replay plan.
supremacy_cell_matrix: +450 lines — schema constants, enum serde for all 8
enums, validate_artifact error paths, interference index symmetry, fixture
structural checks.
seqlock_fastpath: +245 lines — serde round-trips for all types, uninitialized
behavior, seed_if_uninitialized, publish, telemetry accounting, clone semantics.
seqlock_reader_writer_contract: formatting and import reordering.

Other files: rustfmt formatting fixes in counterfactual_evaluator,
counterfactual_replay_engine, flow_envelope, module_cache,
obstruction_certificate, one_lever_policy, stage_envelope_certificate,
synthesis_budget, governance_audit_ledger.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -2574,7 +2574,12 @@ mod tests {
         let trace = make_trace(vec![make_decision(0, "native", 500_000)]);
         let alt = make_alternate_policy("alt-1", "test");
         engine
-            .compare(std::slice::from_ref(&trace), std::slice::from_ref(&alt), &default_scope(), None)
+            .compare(
+                std::slice::from_ref(&trace),
+                std::slice::from_ref(&alt),
+                &default_scope(),
+                None,
+            )
             .unwrap();
         engine
             .compare(&[trace], &[alt], &default_scope(), None)
